name: THE Simplest RAW Brownie
intro: Once you’ve tried this recipe, you’ll wonder how something so simple can taste so good! This raw brownie easily beats regular brownies, both in wholesomeness and in flavor.
method: Pulverize 1 cup (2 dl) walnuts in the food processor. Remove the pits from the dates. Add in the dates, cacao powder and salt, and process until you have a dough. Stir in the remaining walnuts. Press the dough into a small mold, or shape it into a square and cut into smaller squares. Store in the refrigerator.
